title: GregTech: VR Edition
body:
# GregTech: VR Edition

**Description:**  
Step into a world where industrial engineering meets immersive VR! **GregTech: VR Edition** is a Minecraft modpack that combines the depth of **GregTech** with the immersive experience of **Vivecraft**. Designed for players who crave a challenging, realistic tech progression system while fully experiencing Minecraft in virtual reality, this modpack offers an unparalleled journey through advanced machinery, resource processing, and exploration.

## Features

- **Industrial Complexity:**  
  With **GregTech**, dive deep into a complex tech tree, focusing on detailed ore processing, multi-block structures, and advanced automation. Master the art of engineering as you build intricate factories and harness new technologies.

- **Immersive VR Gameplay:**  
  Thanks to **Vivecraft**, you'll be able to explore and interact with your world in virtual reality. Mine ores with a swing of your hand, assemble machines with life-like motions, and navigate complex machinery up close.

- **Resource Management:**  
  GregTech introduces a challenging resource system, making you strategize on gathering and using resources effectively. Learn to utilize every tool at your disposal, from manual mining to fully automated setups.

- **Customized Progression:**  
  The modpack is balanced to enhance both the realism of GregTech and the interactivity of Vivecraft. Progression is finely tuned to keep the challenge engaging and reward creativity and innovation.

- **VR-Optimized Settings:**  
  Experience the game in a way that’s optimized for VR, with custom controls and interactions suited to Vivecraft, ensuring a smooth and immersive experience.

### How the versioning works
- The current way I have the version page setup is that the most recent one will always be for a Project called QuestCraft (which allows people to play Minecraft in vr on a standalone vr headset) these will always have vivecraft removed from them as the Project uses its own build of vivecraft.
- The Versions for said Project will always be labeled as such
---
